description: User navigates from a filtered view of the results to an unfiltered view, as seen by the URL change and the response count increasing from 5/20 to 20/20.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The results page for a multiple choice question updates to show all responses instead of a filtered subset.

description: User navigates from the unfiltered view back to a filtered view of the results, with the response count returning to 5/20.
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The results page updates to show a filtered subset of responses.
